steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “so that attendees could use that understanding to improve their own work” reveals that the presentation was designed to enable learning—a knowledge-building objective that attendees can actually apply.

steps.title: Match the choice to the meaning
steps.content:
”Insight into” expresses exactly this: fostering insight into techniques means developing the understanding attendees need to apply those techniques successfully.

The other three introduce ignorance (obliviousness), lack logical sense (exceptions), or encourage the opposite of learning (hesitancy).

That confirms A is correct.
